values.freshText: Our kitchen opens at dawn. Meringue, masa, and pastry — everything made fresh each morning.

values.cateringText: Pavlova towers, dessert tables, and full Latin menus for events of every size.

about.title: Venezuelan Soul, Tampa Heart
about.p1: Pavlova Love Tampa was born from a passion for authentic Venezuelan flavors and the timeless art of pavlova-making. We blend Latin culinary traditions with the warmth of a family kitchen.
about.p2: From our signature meringue pavlovas to fresh arepas, hallacas, and café con leche — every item is made from scratch daily in our Tampa kitchen.

catering.title: Making Your Events Unforgettable
catering.text: From intimate gatherings to corporate events, we bring authentic Venezuelan flavors to your celebration. Custom menus, pavlova towers, and full catering packages available.

delivery.directText: Best prices, freshest pickup, and it supports us most. Reserve online and we'll have it ready.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Venezuelan roots, Tampa heart
about.section1: Pavlova Love Tampa was founded by a family passionate about sharing the rich culinary heritage of Venezuela with the Tampa Bay community. Every recipe has been passed down through generations, adapted with local ingredients, and perfected with care.
about.section2: Our kitchen comes alive at 4am daily. From the meringue shells for our pavlovas to the masa for our arepas — everything is made from scratch. We don't believe in shortcuts when it comes to flavor.
about.section3: We're more than a bakery — we're a gathering place. A slice of Venezuela in the heart of Tampa, where neighbors become familia over café con leche and fresh pastries.
